creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Franco, Would you please provide additional detail: e.g. uname -aKU?  Are you using a recent /usr/ports (svnlite info /usr/ports|egrep "Revi|Dat"
), and what version of gcc (gcc -v) are you using?

On FreeBSD 10.2 Stable updated/installed earlier today. An i386 jail using both clang 3.4.1 and gcc 4.8.5_2 I was able to build the package successfully net-snmp-5.7.3_11.txz.
(using package gcc-4.8.5_2.txz that was downloaded and build on Nov 25)

Details as follows:
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  2143360 Dec 22 23:12 net-snmp-5.7.3_11.txz-clang3.4.1
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  2259160 Dec 22 23:17 net-snmp-5.7.3_11.txz-gcc4.8.5
